name: Dovi (Peanut Butter Stew)
recipeIngredient: 2 Green bell peppers, seeded and chopped
3 to 4 Tomatoes, cored and coarser chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large stew pot over moderate heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until golden brown.
3. Add garlic, salt, pepper, and hot pepper. Stir-fry for 2 or 3 minutes.
4. Add chicken and bell peppers; fry, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is brown on all sides.
5. Mash tomatoes with a fork and mix them into the stew along with the water. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Thin the peanut butter with a few tablespoons of hot broth from the pot. Add half of the peanut paste to the stew; continue simmering until the chicken is well done.
7. Wash spinach. Place in a pot, cover, and steam (the water clinging to the leaves is sufficient for steaming) until tender. Drain and combine with the remaining peanut paste. Serve greens with the stew.
8. Serves 4 to 6.
